input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Upstream OGNL uses JDK module-opening JVM args for parts of its own test suite on JDK 17+, so tests that deliberately exercise deep reflective access to JDK internals may still need targeted jvmArgs in test code.
The reported Java-run failure appears tied to changed runtime behavior in existing tests rather than missing deterministic setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process Java expression/reflection library; its only runtime dependency for 3.3.5 is transitive Javassist, and normal expression/property coverage does not require an external service, Docker image, or extra Maven test dependency.
